name: AI Job Application Engine (scrape, screen, tailor resume + cover, email)

parameters.content:
# AI Job Application Engine

Scrapes fresh LinkedIn jobs, screens them against your profile with AI, writes a tailored resume and cover letter for each real match, and emails them to you with a tracker row. Works for any user, nothing is hardcoded.

### How it works
1. Fill the form: email, target role, seniority, locations, skills, deal-breakers, and paste your resume.
2. Apify scrapes LinkedIn, then a free pre-filter drops duplicates and obvious mismatches.
3. An AI agent (Haiku) screens each job for relevance and eligibility and keeps the best 5.
4. A second AI (Sonnet) writes a tailored resume and cover letter from your resume text, no fabrication, no em-dashes.
5. DocRaptor turns them into PDFs, emails them to you, and logs each match to a Google Sheet.

### Setup
1. Add credentials: Anthropic (all three Chat Model nodes), DocRaptor (Basic Auth, API key as username, blank password), Google Sheets, Gmail.
2. In Run Apify, replace YOUR_APIFY_TOKEN with your Apify token (LinkedIn Jobs Scraper actor).
3. Make a Google Sheet with a Tracker tab (Date, Company, Role, Fit, Verdict, Why, ApplyURL, Status) and paste its ID.
4. DocRaptor nodes are in test mode (free, watermarked); set test:false for clean PDFs.
5. Open the form URL and submit.

### Customization tips
Broaden the target keywords for more matches, adjust the fit threshold in Rank + Keep Top 5, or swap models in the Chat Model nodes.

## 1. Collect and scrape
Form captures the user prefs and resume, then Apify scrapes fresh LinkedIn jobs.

## 2. Filter and AI screen
Free pre-filter and dedup, then one AI agent scores relevance plus eligibility and keeps the top 5.

## 3. Tailor resume and cover
Build prompts from the resume, write both documents with AI, render HTML, and make PDFs with DocRaptor.

## 4. Deliver
Bundle both PDFs, email them to the user, and log the match to the tracker sheet.

parameters.formTitle: Find and tailor jobs for me

options.systemMessage: You are a strict job screener. Reply with ONLY the JSON object asked for, nothing else.
You are an expert resume writer. Return ONLY the JSON object requested. No preamble, no code fences.

nodes.name: Resume PDF (DocRaptor)
nodes.notes: DocRaptor: Basic Auth, username = API key, password blank. test:true = free watermarked PDF; set false for live.

options.systemMessage: You are an expert cover-letter writer. Return ONLY the JSON object requested. No preamble, no code fences.

nodes.name: Cover PDF (DocRaptor)
nodes.notes: DocRaptor: Basic Auth, username = API key, password blank. test:true = free watermarked PDF; set false for live.

parameters.message:
={{ '

' + $json.jobTitle + ' at ' + $json.companyName + '

' + $json.verdict + ' fit ' + $json._fit + '

' + ($json.reason||'') + '

Apply on company site

Resume and cover letter attached.

' }}
parameters.subject: ={{ 'Job match: ' + $json.jobTitle + ' at ' + $json.companyName + ' (' + $json.verdict + ')' }}

nodes.name: Tracker Row (Sheets)
nodes.notes: Add Google Sheets credential + your sheet ID. Tab "Tracker".
